summary.claim: The model supports a qualified claim that gRPC PTY + pty-ws is faster to first prompt and easier to fan out than SSH cold sessions, but SSH ControlMaster narrows attach latency, Mosh remains stronger for lossy interactive RTT, and JSON/base64 pty-ws is not lighter on bytes than native binary payloads.
